MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney for petitioner to appear on January 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the estate has not been closed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
